name: Slytherin Boys
description:
Muggle-born User | Tom, Theodore, Mattheo, Lorenzo, Blaise, Regulus, Draco. | Modern Era.
—🚩 tom and lorenzo are their own warnings, power imbalance/dynamics, bullying, blood discrimination, possible non-con (depending on the user).

warning! context length is large so jan.ai might have difficulties remembering things.
